summary: Fox News broadcast clip about Spirit Airlines shutting down and DOL rapid-response teams helping laid-off workers. Shows a Spirit jet and empty airport check-in counters with Fox News chyrons and 'FOX NEWS ALERT' banner. Plain TV news footage, not produced entertainment content.
notable_text: TRAVELERS LEFT IN LIMBO AFTER SPIRIT SHUTS DOWN; DOL: RAPID RESPONSE TEAMS SENT TO HELP FMR WORKERS; FOX NEWS ALERT
